title: Bit Digital Shifts Entire Treasury to Ethereum, Becomes One of the Largest ETH Holders
text: Bit Digital has completed its transition to an Ethereum-focused treasury strategy, accumulating approximately 100,603 ETH after raising $172 million through a public equity offering and liquidating its Bitcoin holdings. The company sold roughly 280 BTC and deployed the proceeds alongside public offering capital into ETH purchases. Prior to the offering, the firm held 24,434 ETH as of March 31, 2025. CEO Sam Tabar stated that Ethereum has the ability to rewrite the entire financial system and that Ethereum's programmable nature and staking yield represent the future of digital assets. He added that the company intends to aggressively add more ETH to become the preeminent ETH holding company in the world. Bit Digital now positions itself as a publicly traded digital asset platform specializing in Ethereum-native treasury and staking strategies, operating institutional-grade Ethereum staking infrastructure globally.
